messages.content: 翻译Provided surface modifcations are done on compounds so that they can target receptors available on macrophages.
提供了对化合物进行表面修饰的方法，使其能够针对巨噬细胞上的受体。

翻译Receptor-mediated phagocytosis is one of the essential macrophage-targeted therapeutic strategies. Provided surface modifcations are done on compounds so that they can target receptors available on macrophages.
受体介导的吞噬是一种重要的针对巨噬细胞的治疗策略之一。通过对化合物进行表面修饰，使其能够针对巨噬细胞上可用的受体。
翻译The frst step toward this process is the fusion with lysosomes of destructive nature before they are recognized, engulfed, and entrapped into phagosomes.
这个过程的第一步是在这些化合物被巨噬细胞识别、吞噬并困住在吞噬体中之前，与具有破坏性的溶酶体融合。
翻译the particles are also prepared in such a manner that they can escape phagosomes following endocytosis but just before fusion with the lysosome (Placha and Jampilek 2021).
这些颗粒也以这样的方式制备，以便在内吞作用后但在与溶酶体融合之前能够逃离吞噬体（Placha和Jampilek，2021年）。

翻译On any given tissue, there are several sites for receptor, therefore, targeted delivery is predominantly a smart approach for the bioactive material delivery, which has a narrow therapeutic window or concentration is very low at the targeting site
在任何给定组织中，都存在多个受体位点，因此，靶向传递主要是一种智能方法，用于传递具有狭窄治疗窗口或在靶向位点浓度非常低的生物活性物质。
翻译then it possesses therapeutic importance
那么它具有治疗重要性。

翻译The prepared antibiotic-loaded polycaprolactone (PCL) and poly-D,L-lactic acid (PDLLA) microspheres showed sustained in vitro release of antibiotics with an antimicrobial potential against the OM microbial and S. aureus for 5 days
预制的含抗生素的聚己内酯（PCL）和聚D,L-乳酸（PDLLA）微球显示出抗生素的持续体外释放，并对耳朵炎微生物和金黄色葡萄球菌具有抗菌潜力，持续作用了5天。
翻译Numerous functional groups are present on the surface, enhancing their functional properties, and making them biocompatible and versatile
表面上存在着众多的功能基团，增强了它们的功能性，并使它们具有生物相容性和多功能性。

翻译A graphical outline of treatment-based nanotechnology. Different nanocarriers can target vital organs after the surface alteration. The parasites penetrate the human skin and are absorbed into the bloodstream where they travel via the blood vessels. The administration of a nanotechnology-based drug (oral or intravenous injection) results in the membrane (tegument) of the microbes being broken, releasing the drug to destroy the microbes
治疗型纳米技术的图示概述。不同的纳米载体在表面改性后可以靶向重要器官。寄生虫穿透人体皮肤并被吸收到血液中，然后通过血管传播。基于纳米技术的药物给药（口服或静脉注射）导致微生物膜（鞭毛）破裂，释放药物以摧毁微生物。
翻译Cell targeting ability of DNA-incorporated SLNs can be improved by modifying the formulation with mannan. The transfection ability was assessed on the RAW 264.7 cell line.
通过使用甘露寡糖对DNA包含的固体脂质纳米粒(SLNs)进行配方改良，可以提高其对细胞的靶向能力。对RAW 264.7细胞系进行了转染能力的评估。
翻译Based on these receptors and their opsonization process, the surface of the nanoparticle is often modifed.
基于这些受体及其贪婪作用过程，纳米粒子的表面通常被修改。
